item.title: AG challenges FNM; property tax push
item.ns0:title: AG challenges FNM; property tax push
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, the Attorney General issues a bold challenge to the opposition over controversial cabinet appointments while a new voice in the Senate calls for strict accountability and measurable results in the national budget. We investigate the tragic details of a hit-and-run fatality on Grand Bahama and a harrowing shark attack involving a young visitor in the Exumas. Our team also looks into the push for property tax reform to protect homeowners and a major debate over televising parliamentary proceedings for greater transparency. Join us for these stories, a look at the latest international headlines, and your complete tropical weather and sports updates.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, the Attorney General issues a bold challenge to the opposition over controversial cabinet appointments while a new voice in the Senate calls for strict accountability and measurable results in the national budget. We investigate the tragic details of a hit-and-run fatality on Grand Bahama and a harrowing shark attack involving a young visitor in the Exumas. Our team also looks into the push for property tax reform to protect homeowners and a major debate over televising parliamentary proceedings for greater transparency. Join us for these stories, a look at the latest international headlines, and your complete tropical weather and sports updates.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, the Attorney General issues a bold challenge to the opposition over controversial cabinet appointments while a new voice in the Senate calls for strict accountability and measurable results in the national budget. We investigate the tragic details of a hit-and-run fatality on Grand Bahama and a harrowing shark attack involving a young visitor in the Exumas. Our team also looks into the push for property tax reform to protect homeowners and a major debate over televising parliamentary proceedings for greater transparency. Join us for these stories, a look at the latest international headlines, and your complete tropical weather and sports updates.
-----

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
